fact: This product is a multi-tenant hospital management platform. Platform admin has full cross-hospital visibility and control.
Each hospital has its own hospital admin and staff users. Hospital admins manage only their assigned hospital.
The web stack is Next.js with TypeScript and Supabase Postgres for local-first development and hosted deployment later.
Authentication is email and password based. Platform admin email is configured in environment variables.
Passwords must be hashed for storage. Newly issued or reset passwords may be displayed once to an authorized admin but must never be retrievable later.
Internal communication uses socket-based chat with document sharing for office work.
Core role set currently includes PLATFORM_ADMIN, HOSPITAL_ADMIN, DOCTOR, NURSE, RECEPTIONIST, LAB_TECHNICIAN, PHARMACIST, BILLING_STAFF, ACCOUNTANT, HR_MANAGER, OPERATIONS_MANAGER, and PATIENT.
Audit logs are required for user creation, password resets, and role changes.
